subject: grx_milestone_closeout
owner_ruling: user terminal ruling 2026-07-13 (main-session AskUserQuestion) = honest-ceiling close-out, then re-adjudicated the same day to a REVISED close-out after the culling retraction: the gpu_culling/016/018 device-removal was reconvicted as a Godot D3D12 driver misaligned buffer_clear (16B RAW-UAV alignment) bug, NOT an RDG architecture gap; R1b+R1c fixes give gpu_culling rd_native a byte-exact strict success (max_abs=0), and GRX-016/018 are unblocked (not implemented). The 1.5x strict gate (G-GRX-5) verdict is UNCHANGED: it stays archived as structurally unreachable (measured) because the strict success is net-zero on this gate scene (high-water-mark full count) and compaction is assessed at single-digit percent on this bench. GRX-023..026 are closed on this revised honest basis. Agent-autonomy precedent b17fd67 + g2.6 agent self-signed close-out apply; the formal front-matter status flip and signature line are finalized by the main-session close-out commit.
signature: 白栀 (via 主会话 close-out commit)

culling_retraction.retracted_verdict: gpu_culling/016/018 mechanism_blocked (general RDG same-frame compute->DISPATCH_INDIRECT->draw_indirect sync gap)
culling_retraction.actual_root_cause: Godot D3D12 driver misaligned RenderingDevice::buffer_clear: clearing a per-surface count dword at a byte offset that is not a multiple of 16 lowers to an out-of-spec RAW buffer UAV (D3D12_RAW_UAV_SRV_BYTE_ALIGNMENT) and removes the device (0x887A0005)

two_reproducers.misaligned_buffer_clear_real_culprit: spike/godot-rurix/upstream-repro/rd-buffer-clear-misaligned-offset/ (offset 4/8/12/20/36 removes device frame 1; 0/16/32/48 clean; offset % 16 law)

culling_retraction.gpu_culling_verdict: grx015_rd_native_r1c_picture_preserving_first_strict_success (candidate engage + no device removal on any leg + byte-exact vs native reference max_abs=0); default disabled because net-zero on this scene + no per-pass bench ratio evidence

one_five_x_strict_gate.note: The gate math, the three thresholds (1.5/0.3/0.95), perf_gate.py and its schema are ALL unchanged and NOT relaxed. What is archived is the measured fact that the 1.5x target is unreachable on this workload/GPU/build (1.50 vs a 1.0669x Amdahl zero-cost hard ceiling). The 2026-07-13 culling retraction (gpu_culling rd_native flipped from mechanism_blocked to strict success) does NOT change this verdict: the strict success is net-zero on this gate scene (high-water-mark == full count, no draw reduction) and compaction (GRX-016) is assessed at single-digit percent on this bench (indirect subset ~40k of ~260k instances, most in-frustum). This is 'archive-as-unreachable', NOT 'lower the gate'. The GRX-025 >=0.95 is a default-enable COST gate (single-pass engaged scenes), a DIFFERENT gate from the 1.5x geomean close-out gate; the two must not be conflated as 'gate passed'.

does_not_imply: default pass enablement (rd_native passes stay per-project opt-in; gpu_culling strict success is net-zero on this scene)
note: Machine-readable GRX milestone close-out marker (REVISED 2026-07-13 for the culling retraction). When present and valid (status=closed, performance_claim=none, decision + owner_ruling + evidence references complete, next_action_when_closed=grx_milestone_closed_ceiling_archived), ci/godot_rurix_toolchain_probe.py advances next_action to grx_milestone_closed_ceiling_archived. If this marker is absent or tampered, the probe fails closed to the honest GRX gate-walk frontier. This marker records the owner's terminal (then revised) ruling; the formal contract front-matter status flip and signature are finalized by the main-session close-out commit.
